description: A marketing campaign needs to identify 'Viral Hubs'—users who are connected to high-spending friends. In the 'demodb' database (root/GymAnything123!), update the 'Profiles' schema to include 'NetworkValue' (Double) and 'IsViralHub' (Boolean). For every profile, calculate 'NetworkValue' as the sum of the 'Price' of all orders made by direct friends. Set 'IsViralHub' to true for profiles with 3 or more direct friends and a 'NetworkValue' greater than 1500; otherwise, set it to false.
